basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Research Personnel Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT) Recruitment 2026: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat has released the official notification for 6 Research Personnel posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking research jobs.

application_fee.all_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years for Project Associate-II and Project Associate-I
age_limit.details: Project Associate-II: Maximum 35 years Project Associate-I: Maximum 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/equivalent degree) with minimum aggregate First Class/CGPA 6.5 for all qualified degrees. For JRF, qualification in National Level eligibility test CSIR-UGC NET/GATE is required. For Project Associate-II and Project Associate-I, 2 years' experience in Research and Development is preferred for Project Associate-II.
qualification.details: Research Personnel (Junior Research Fellow): B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/equivalent degree), Qualified in National Level eligibility test CSIR-UGC NET/GATE Research Personnel (Project Associate-II): B.E./B.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/or equivalent) And 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services Research Personnel (Project Associate-I): B.E./B.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/ or equivalent)

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (JRF), Rs. 35,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-II with GATE/NET), Rs. 28,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-II without GATE/NET), Rs. 31,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-I with GATE/NET), Rs. 25,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-I without GATE/NET)
salary_details.details: Research Personnel (Junior Research Fellow): Rs. 37,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Research Personnel (Project Associate-II): With GATE/NET*: Rs. 35,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Without GATE/NET*: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Research Personnel (Project Associate-I): With GATE/NET*: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Without GATE/NET*: Rs. 25,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.sardar_vallabhbhai_national_institute_of: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (JRF), Rs. 35,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-II with GATE/NET), Rs. 28,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-II without GATE/NET), Rs. 31,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-I with GATE/NET), Rs. 25,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. (Project Associate-I without GATE/NET)

B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/equivalent degree) with minimum aggregate First Class/CGPA 6.5 for all qualified degrees. content_sections.heading: SVNIT Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SVNIT Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SVNIT Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Personnel (Junior Research Fellow): B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/equivalent degree), Qualified in National Level eligibility test CSIR-UGC NET/GATE Research Personnel (Project Associate-II): B.E./B.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/or equivalent) And 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions or Science and Technology Organizations and Scientific activities and services Research Personnel (Project Associate-I): B.E./B.Tech. (Electronics/Electronics & Communication/ or equivalent)

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Project Associate-II: Maximum 35 years Project Associate-I: Maximum 35 years

content_sections.heading: SVNIT Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Research Personnel (Junior Research Fellow): Rs. 37,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Research Personnel (Project Associate-II): With GATE/NET*: Rs. 35,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Without GATE/NET*: Rs. 28,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Research Personnel (Project Associate-I): With GATE/NET*: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m. Without GATE/NET*: Rs. 25,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m.

rows.event: Names of eligible candidates uploaded on institute website

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for SVNIT Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SVNIT Research Personnel recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 05-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Research Personnel posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Electronics or equivalent. For JRF, a CSIR-UGC NET/GATE qualification is mandatory. Project Associate-II also requires 2 years of research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Associate-II and Project Associate-I positions is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application submission followed by an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position?
faq.answer: The salary for the JRF position is Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus HRA at 20%.

faq.question: Q6. Are there different salary scales for Project Associate-II based on GATE/NET qualification?
faq.answer: Yes, Project Associate-II with GATE/NET will receive Rs. 35,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m., while those without will get Rs. 28,000/- + HRA@ 20% p.m.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for Research Personnel at SVNIT?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Research Personnel, distributed across Junior Research Fellow, Project Associate-II, and Project Associate-I posts.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It contains comprehensive details about the recruitment.
